title: Unify direct and callback RX telemetry
description: Make callback-based RX update global reception/collision metrics and emit the same rx_success schema as direct RX. Preserve reception state in debug fields by logging before cleanup or carrying the state snapshot. Add parity tests for metrics and logs.
close_reason: Unified callback RX telemetry with direct RX: global metrics, collision handling, observers, rx_success schema, pre-cleanup debug snapshots, and parity tests. Focused simulation tests: 91 passed; ruff clean.
